purpose: Frontend heatmap over complete AOI grids, selectable by date, AOI, product, metric and resolution.
grain: event_date + aoi_id + product_id + metric_id + resolution_km + grid_id

display_contract.note: Final map outputs must not contain null metric_value or relative_score. If AOI-wide fill cannot produce a value, the Gold job fails instead of writing an incomplete serving partition.

limitations: All scores are within-day AOI percentiles and do not compare absolute values across dates.
Filled NASA values are display estimates rather than direct observations.
Fishing hours represent apparent fishing effort, not catch.
